title: selaginella tibetica
intro: Selaginella tibetica, also known as Tibetan club moss, is a type of ancient, air-breathing plant species that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally used in Tibetan medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selaginella tibetica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Selaginella tibetica is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional formulas, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
